hero.tagline: One eye. One Vision. Zero Limits

bio.name: Don Micka de la Vega
bio.heading: Women's Cycling — Aesthetics & Intensity
bio.portraitAlt: Don Micka de la Vega, sports photographer

marquee.text: Capturing power | Structuring movement | Elevating the image of sport.

editorial.intro: Specializing in women's cycling, I develop a demanding visual approach applied to sport. My work stands at the intersection of performance and art direction. Every image is conceived, constructed, and controlled.
editorial.focus: Women's cycling is at the heart of my work. Discipline, endurance, rigor. A raw aesthetic translated into strong, editorial imagery. Each project aims to redefine how the athlete is represented.
